evals.name: State Bootstrap First
evals.question: Does the agent create omg-state.json as the very first action before any other step?

evals.name: Plan Before Execute
evals.question: Does the agent write plan.md and wait for approval before any execution work?

evals.name: Never Rules Respected
evals.question: Does the agent output respect all NEVER constraints (no execute without approval, no background plannotator, no draft annotation processing)?

evals.name: Platform Detection
evals.question: Does the agent correctly detect platform and team availability before choosing execution path?

evals.name: Phase Ordering
evals.question: Does the agent follow strict PLAN→EXECUTE→VERIFY→CLEANUP ordering without skipping phases?

evals.name: Annotate Keyword Handling
evals.question: When annotate keyword is present, does the agent correctly enter VERIFY_UI sub-phase with submit gate?

test_inputs.input: omg implement user authentication with JWT
test_inputs.context: Claude Code with team mode enabled, no annotate keyword

test_inputs.input: omg annotate fix the dashboard layout issues
test_inputs.context: Claude Code with team mode, annotate keyword present

test_inputs.input: omg redesign the REST API endpoints for v2
test_inputs.context: Codex CLI, no team mode, BMAD fallback
Claude Code, team mode disabled, should error
Korean input, Claude Code with team mode

experiments.description: Structural rewrite: 1165→285 lines (75% reduction), NEVER rules at top, reference docs extracted
Add explicit early-exit documentation for Claude Code + teams disabled path
